headline: Otis Worldwide (NYSE:OTIS) Falls After Mixed Fiscal Q2 Results, Service Growth Remains a High Quality Strength
summary: Otis Worldwide Q2 2026 revenue of $3.86B edged estimates, but EPS of $1.01 missed slightly. Strong 9% organic service growth offset new equipment headwinds, leading to a 3.4% pre-market stock decline.

headline: Otis (NYSE:OTIS) Surprises With Q2 CY2026 Sales
summary: Elevator manufacturer Otis (NYSE:OTIS) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 7.3% year on year to $3.86 billion. The company’s full-year revenue guidance of $15.2 billion at the midpoint came in 0.5% above analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.01 per share was in line with analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: OTIS REPORTS SECOND QUARTER 2026 RESULTS
summary: Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE:OTIS) reported second quarter 2026 net sales of $3.9 billion with organic sales up 6% versus the prior year. GAAP earnings per share (EPS) increased 13% to $1.12 and adjusted EPS decreased 4% to $1.01.
